candidate_logic: Complete EC present in one parasite dataset and absent from the other six parasite EC inventories
required_validation: qPCR or amplicon specificity; expression support; cross-parasite negative controls

candidate_logic: Intergenomic parasite-human analog absent from A. cantonensis intragenomic analog list
required_validation: Structural validation; enzymatic assay; larval phenotype assay

candidate_logic: Secreted or surface-associated ECs predicted to remodel host interface
required_validation: Larval migration assay; inflammatory mediator panel

candidate_logic: Energy metabolism or ATP-dependent enzymes supporting movement or homeostasis
required_validation: Dose-response motility assay; viability assay; host toxicity panel

candidate_logic: Enzymes involved in nucleotide metabolism; translation; kinases; amino-acid metabolism
required_validation: Stage-specific expression and developmental phenotype assay

candidate_logic: Proteases may mediate invasion but may overlap with host coagulation or complement biology
interpretation: De-prioritize unless strong selectivity is demonstrated
